xsl:for-each.select: /offer/products/product[ producer/@name != 'Colbor' and producer/@name != 'Insta360' and producer/@name != 'Laowa' and producer/@name != 'Lenspen' and producer/@name != 'Panasonic' and producer/@name != 'Rycote' and producer/@name != 'SanDisk' and producer/@name != 'Synco' and producer/@name != 'Syrp' and producer/@name != 'Tokina' and producer/@name != 'Veikk' and producer/@name != 'Voigtlander' and producer/@name != 'Yongnuo'and price/@gross > 0 and description/name/. != '']

xsl:when.test: ../../strikethrough_retail_price and ../../strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > 0 and ../../strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross and price/@gross = ../../price/@gross and ../../strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > $cena_serwis

(../../strikethrough_retail_price and ../../strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross) or (../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price and ../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross) or (../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price and ../../price/@gross != price/@gross and ../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price/iaiext:site/iaiext:price_per_size[@id = ../../../../../sizes/size/@id]/@gross > price/@gross)
string-length($kod_producer) = '14' or string-length($kod_producer) = '13' or string-length($kod_producer) = '12' or string-length($kod_producer) = '8'
string-length($code_on_card) = '14' or string-length($code_on_card) = '13' or string-length($code_on_card) = '12' or string-length($code_on_card) = '8'
